# Alternating Field_Demagnetization

**Summary**: Removing unstable magnetic components by subjecting samples to a decaying alternating magnetic field.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] used alternating-field_demagnetization to remove secondary magnetization from the rock specimens.

## Key Results and Findings

- Demagnetization at fields up to 1000 Oe was used to isolate ChRM. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 51]])
